description: Guard against false dissociation routing (guard-mild-trauma-dissociation): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually trauma territory. classify should recommend trauma and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses dissociation-adjacent language but is actually trauma territory. Should recommend trauma path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I had something happen to me in college that I've never really dealt with. When I think about it I feel disconnected — like I'm seeing it from outside, foggy. But I don't lose time and I'm still myself. It's just hard to be present when I'm reminded of it. I jump at loud noises and I avoid the part of town where it happened.
